550 O0700_PHYSN_ORDR_NUM O0700_PHYSN_ORDR_NUM O0700 Physician Order Day Number CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the physician (or authorized assistant or practitioner) changed the resident's orders in the last 14 days. discontinued 09/30/2023
551 P0100A_BED_RAIL_CD P0100A_BED_RAIL_CD P0100A Physical Restraints in Bed: Bed Rail Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a bed rail(s) was used.
